response.overview: Vanaliya is a 1958 Sri Lankan film directed by B. A. W. Jayamanne. The film stars B. A. W. Jayamanne,  Shirley Blythe,  Dharmasri Ranatunga,  Patricia Walker,  Sumithra Walker, Mabel Blythe,  Grace Jayamanne,  Austin Abeysekera. Released on 21 February. Based on Tamil filmMinnalkodi. The film was produced in Sri Lanka.
response.title: Vanaliya
